---
title: "Where Quasi-Monte Carlo Theory and Practice Meet"
author: "Fred J. Hickernell"
subtitle: |
  Illinois Institute of Technology, hickernell@illinoistech.edu

  Joint work with several collaborators and the <span class="pkg">qmcpy</span> development team

  Supported in part by NSF-DMS-2316011 &nbsp; &nbsp;  ·  &nbsp; &nbsp; Thanks to the organizers

  Monte Carlo and Quasi-Monte Carlo Methods 2026 (MCQMC26), Edinburgh

  🔗 Slides: fjhickernell.github.io/MCQMC26/slides/MCQMC26.html

date: 2026-06-08
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"

metadata-files:
  - ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/research/research-slides.yml

execute:
  echo: false

format:
  revealjs:
    code-overflow: wrap
    footer: |
      Fred J. Hickernell · Illinois Institute of Technology · assisted by ChatGPT

---


# Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) Has Grown Over Several Decades

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory
&nbsp;
* [Theory]{.alert} justifies and explains practice
&nbsp;
* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Motivates and tests theory 
  - Solves real problems

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font: 1em;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>

:::

:::

:::

## No QMC with foundation only

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

  - Rooted in multiple disciplines 

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-only-root"></div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-root-label algebra">Algebra</div>
<div class="tree-root-label analysis">Analysis</div>
<div class="tree-root-label cs">Computer<br>Science</div>
<div class="tree-root-label statistics">Statistics</div>

:::

:::

:::

# Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) Has Grown Over Several Decades

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory
&nbsp;
* [Theory]{.alert} justifies and explains practice
&nbsp;
* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Motivates and tests theory 
  - Solves real problems


::: {.fragment .current-visible}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="2"}

Content for state 3

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="3"}

Content for state 4

:::

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font: 1em;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="1"}

::: {.tree-slide}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-only-root"></div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>

:::

:::

:::

:::



# Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) Has Grown Over Several Decades

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory
&nbsp;
* [Theory]{.alert} justifies and explains practice
&nbsp;
* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Motivates and tests theory 
  - Solves real problems


::: {.fragment .current-visible}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="2"}

Content for state 3

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="3"}

Content for state 4

:::

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font: 1em;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>

:::

::: {.fragment .current-visible data-fragment-index="1"}

::: {.tree-slide}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-only-root"></div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>

:::

:::

:::

:::



# Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) Has Grown Over Several Decades

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory
&nbsp;
* [Theory]{.alert} justifies and explains practice
&nbsp;
* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Motivates and tests theory 
  - Solves real problems

:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font: 1em;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>

:::

:::

:::


## No QMC with Foundation Only

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

:::


::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-only-root"></div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>

:::

:::

---

::: {.tree-slide}

![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}

<div class="tree-only-root"></div>

<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>

:::




# Theory and Practice Are Both Important

# Low Discrepancy Sequence Constructions

# Data-Driven Error Bounds

# Software Development and Dissemination

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

exec(open("../classlib/classlib/quarto/includes/qmc_software_table.py").read())

render_qmc_software_table("../data/qmc-software.yml", mode="slides", start=0, stop=9) 
```

---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

exec(open("../classlib/classlib/quarto/includes/qmc_software_table.py").read())

render_qmc_software_table("../data/qmc-software.yml", mode="slides", start=9) 
```

# Collaboration and Community

## Thanks to many collaborators

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import yaml
from pathlib import Path
people = yaml.safe_load(Path("../data/collaborators.yml").read_text())
ncols = 6
img_width = "135px"
print(f'<div class="collab-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat({ncols}, 1fr);">')
for person in people:
    slug = person["slug"]
    caption = person["caption"]
    img = f"../assets/img/headshots/processed/{slug}.jpg"
    print(f'''
<div class="collab-card">
  <img src="{img}" alt="{caption}" style="width:{img_width};">
  <div class="collab-caption">{caption}</div>
</div>
''')

print("</div>")
```
---

# Future Directions
